we're going away together

A cozy tiny home
on the Sunshine Coast

A rustic little cabin perched on the edge of the Walker Creek gully — on a real working mushroom farm just outside Langdale, near Gibsons, BC. Just us, the forest, and a swinging loft bed.

📅 July 17 – 19, 2026 · two nights

Here's our home for the weekend

Tap any photo to look closer 👀

The swinging loft bed + kitchen
Driftwood pot rack & forest views
Ladder-stairs up to our nest

I know you might be a little down right now being sick and unable to go explore in your follicular phase, so I went ahead and booked us a little adventure. I want to go on all of the little and big adventures we talk about and I can't wait to show you the Sunshine Coast 🤍

We can walk into Gibsons along the old Farm Stand road, past all the little farms. Slow mornings, no agenda, just good coffee and you.

Some ideas for our trip

Tap each one to peek inside 🗺️

🌀

Skookumchuck Narrows

Egmont · ~4km forest walk each way
⌄
★ 4.7 · a coast classic

One of the wildest tidal rapids in the world — saltwater roaring through a narrow channel, with whirlpools and even kayakers surfing the current. An easy-ish walk through the woods leads to the viewpoint. We'll time it for the peak tide so we catch the whole show.

📍 Open in Maps
🍏

Banditry Cider

Gibsons · ciders by a duck pond
⌄
★ 4.8 · the cute one

A dreamy little cider garden with a pond, a bridge, and resident ducks. We grab a tasting flight, find a spot in the garden, and do absolutely nothing for a while. There's usually a food truck on site too.

📍 Open in Maps
🍻

Persephone Brewing

Gibsons · brewery on a farm
⌄
★ 4.7 · live music + chickens

A farm brewery with loads of outdoor seating, live music, smash burgers, and a little walk to go see the chickens. The unofficial first-stop-off-the-ferry on the Coast. Beer, cider, seltzer — something for both of us.

📍 Open in Maps
🌸

Sunday Cider

Gibsons · magical garden
⌄
★ 4.8 · so pretty

Thoughtful ciders in a garden with cozy domes and little fire tents — extra lovely if the weather turns. Bakery and ice cream on site. The kind of spot we'll want to linger at way too long.

📍 Open in Maps
🏘️

Wander Sechelt

Sechelt · seaside town day
⌄
★ explore + lunch

A drive up the coast to poke around Sechelt — beaches on two sides, little shops, and lunch somewhere good. We can hit The Bricker Cider Co. (★4.7, live music & lawn games) on the way through too. The perfect lazy in-between day.

📍 Open in Maps

Our home base near Gibsons → adventures up the coast 🚗

🤍

So… will you come away with me for our second adventure?

Two nights away in a tiny little home surrounded by a forest full of mushrooms.

It's already booked, just gotta say yes (and maybe give me a smooch).

Love, Alex 🌿
Made with love · Walker Creek tiny home · Gibsons, BC
